member.summary: Marks the transaction as committed — no rollback will occur on Dispose.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.NavigationTransactionScope.Rollback
member.summary: Explicitly rolls back navigation state to the snapshot taken at transaction start.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.NavigationTransactionScope.Dispose
member.summary: On dispose — if not committed, automatically rolls back.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.DispatchPriority.Low

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.PriorityDispatcherQueue
member.summary: Weighted Round-Robin priority dispatcher queue. Weights: Critical 50%, Normal 35%, Low 15%. Includes per-level aging boost and a hard 1000ms flush for starved slots.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.PriorityDispatcherQueue.Enqueue(System.Action,FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.DispatchPriority)
member.summary: Enqueues an action into the specified priority lane. Drops oldest entry when cap is exceeded.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.PriorityDispatcherQueue.DrainViaWeightedRoundRobin
member.summary: Drains queued work items onto the UI dispatcher using WRR scheduling. Thread safety: The method executes on the UI thread via SafeDispatcher.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.PriorityDispatcherQueue.PendingCount(FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.DispatchPriority)
member.summary: Gets the current pending count for the given priority lane.

member.summary: Thread-safe dispatcher wrapper that prevents re-entrant deadlocks and ensures all UI operations execute correctly regardless of calling thread context.

member.summary: Gets the WPF application dispatcher, falling back safely if not yet initialized.

M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SnapshotCoordinator.EnterFreezeAsync(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Acquires the global freeze barrier exclusively. All subsystems must check before mutating shared state. Times out after 10 seconds to prevent deadlocks.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SnapshotCoordinator.IsFrozen
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the system is currently in a snapshot freeze. Subsystems should poll this flag and defer mutations during freeze.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SnapshotCoordinator.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the freeze barrier and resumes normal subsystem operation.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.QueueOverflowPolicy.Coalesce

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.ViewModelLeakDetector.EstimatedLiveCount

member.summary: Resets counters — use only in test teardown scenarios.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateStore
member.summary:
Thread-safe, double-buffered Singleton implementation of IApplicationStateStore.
Features: - All mutations are lock-protected with double-buffer swap. - Freeze barrier (SnapshotCoordinator.IsFrozen) is respected: mutations are queued and applied after the freeze lifts. - Settings are serialized to disk atomically (temp-file swap) on every change. - Restore validates values before applying.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateStore.TakeSnapshot
member.summary: Takes an immutable snapshot of the current state. Respects the SnapshotCoordinator freeze barrier.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateStore.RestoreSnapshot(FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateData)
member.summary: Restores state from a previously taken snapshot. Validates all values before applying.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateStore.PersistCurrentStateAsync
member.summary: Persists current state to disk atomically (write-to-temp then rename).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateStore.LoadPersistedStateAsync
member.summary: Loads and restores persisted state from disk on startup.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateData
member.summary: Serializable state data bag — value type semantics via explicit Clone().

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.AuthSessionBootstrap
member.summary: Establishes a minimal authenticated session for the desktop shell at startup.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.AuthSessionStore
member.summary: Thread-safe store for the active authenticated session.

member.summary: Implementation of IDialogService that leverages TaskCompletionSource to allow async await dialog flows.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.LogBuffer
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory ring-buffer logging sink capped at 10,000 entries.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.MemorySmoothingScheduler
member.summary:
Schedules incremental GC cleanup and deferred LOH compaction.
Design: - Runs incremental Gen0+Gen1 cleanup every 2 minutes during idle periods. - LOH compaction (GCSettings.LargeObjectHeapCompactionMode) is ONLY triggered: a) During guaranteed application-idle periods (no UI activity for 30s), AND b) When working set exceeds the configured pressure threshold (300MB default). - A 500ms dispatcher-idle check gates all operations to ensure zero UI stutter.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.MemorySmoothingScheduler.Start
member.summary: Starts the background memory management loop.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.MemorySmoothingScheduler.NotifyActivity
member.summary: Call this from the WPF shell on any user interaction (mouse move, keypress) to reset the idle clock and prevent premature LOH compaction.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.NavigationService
member.summary: Thread-safe, transactional navigation service. - All navigation requests are serialized through a SemaphoreSlim lock. - Consecutive duplicate navigations are suppressed. - Navigation state is persisted asynchronously. - Outgoing ViewModels are disposed on transition if they implement IDisposable. - Full commit/rollback transaction semantics via NavigationTransactionScope.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.NavigationScopeHandle
member.summary: Reference-counted wrapper around IServiceScope to manage UI ViewModel lifetimes safely. Thread safety: All internal count modifications are synchronized using lock.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.NotificationService
member.summary: Service coordinating the raising of notification toast events to UI overlays.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemHealthMonitor
member.summary: UI health watchdog that: - Pings the WPF Dispatcher at 1Hz using a background thread - Measures response latency with a moving 30-sample average - Uses linear regression trend prediction to detect slow degradation early - Carries a recovery exclusion lock to prevent collision with active navigation transactions - Triggers self-healing (garbage collect + warn) at configurable thresholds

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemHealthMonitor.Start
member.summary: Starts the watchdog background loop.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemHealthMonitor.LastLatencyMs
member.summary: Gets the last measured UI dispatcher latency in milliseconds.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemHealthMonitor.AverageLatencyMs
member.summary: Gets the moving average latency across the last 30 samples.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemHealthMonitor.ComputeLatencySlope
member.summary: Linear regression on latency samples to predict deterioration trend. Returns slope in ms per sample.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemIntegrityValidator
member.summary: Hourly system integrity auditor. Checks navigation stack bounds, ViewModel leak counts, memory headroom, and queue health. Logs warnings on any detected anomaly.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemIntegrityValidator.Start
member.summary: Starts the hourly audit background loop.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase
member.summary: Base view model providing: - INotifyPropertyChanged via ObservableObject (CommunityToolkit.Mvvm) - 30Hz throttled bounded UI update dispatcher - EventSubscriptionTracker for safe handler detachment - ViewModelLeakDetector registration (DEBUG only) - Strict IDisposable lifecycle with finalizer fallback

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.LogViewerViewModel
member.summary:
Diagnostics Log Viewer ViewModel.
Features: - 15ms batching timer slices all incoming log entries before updating the ObservableCollection. - Hard cap of 1000 visible rows (oldest trimmed first). - Diagnostics HUD properties: live ViewModel count, subscriptions estimate, and memory metrics. - Full IDisposable lifecycle with EventSubscriptionTracker.

member.summary: Filtered visible log entries — updated via 15ms batch timer.

member.summary: Current process working set in megabytes.
